---
page-layout: full
---

## 📄 Project Sources

### Documents

-   [Microbiome definition re-visited: old concepts and new challenges](resources/s40168-020-00875-0.pdf){target="_blank"}

-   [phyloseq: An R Package for Reproducible Interactive Analysis and Graphics of Microbiome Census Data](resources/pone.0061217.pdf){target="_blank"}

-   [PERMANOVA](resources/PERMANOVA_-_Department_of_Statistics.pdf){target="_blank"}

-   [Waste Not, Want Not: Why Rarefying Microbiome Data Is Inadmissible](resources/pcbi.1003531.pdf){target="_blank"}

-   [Mesures de la Biodiversité](resources/Mesures_de_la_Biodiversite.pdf){target="_blank"}

-   [Guide pratique à destination des biologistes, bioinformaticiens et statisticiens qui souhaitent s’initier aux analyses métabarcoding](resources/article.pdf){target="_blank"}

### Links

-   [https://clement.poupelin.pages-forge.inrae.fr/blog_open16s/](https://clement.poupelin.pages-forge.inrae.fr/blog_open16s/){target="_blank"}

-   [https://bioc.r-universe.dev/articles/SpiecEasi/SpiecEasi.html](https://bioc.r-universe.dev/articles/SpiecEasi/SpiecEasi.html){target="_blank"}

-   [https://joey711.github.io/phyloseq/](https://joey711.github.io/phyloseq/){target="_blank"}

-   [https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/vegan/index.html](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/vegan/index.html){target="_blank"}
